description: The function combines two ordered prices streams.
If 'a' is less than 'b', append 'a' to the merged list.
If 'b' is less than 'a', append 'b' to the merged list.

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: If the last elements of 'merged', 'left', and 'right' are equal, remove the last element from the merged list.
Iterate through the left and right lists to merge elements based on their values.
